title: Telugu inscription dating back to the 16th century found at Bugga Ramalingeswara temple in Tadipatri
description: Carving on the north wall of the Anantapur district temple records obeisance paid by Basavappa, son of Satram Cheruvupalli Kalayya from Mahimaluru in Udayagiri Seema; historian MyNaa Swamy dates it to either 1574 or 1634 CE
